---
name: New Genre Pack
about: Submit a genre pack for a writing domain not yet covered
title: "[GENRE] "
labels: genre-pack, contribution
assignees: ''
---

## Genre name
What domain does this cover? (e.g., technical documentation, grant writing, journalism)

## Who writes in this genre?
Who is the typical author and who is the typical reader?

## Weighting adjustments
Which scoring categories should be weighted higher or lower for this genre? (Use the format from existing genre packs)

| Category | Weight Modifier | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| | | |

## Architecture
What is the standard structure for this type of writing? (Section order, required components)

## Voice notes
What does strong writing sound like in this genre? What's the register, formality, vocabulary tier?

## Common failures
What are the most common mistakes writers make in this genre? (List at least 5)

## Example (optional)
If you have a before/after example or a gold-standard sample, include it here.

## Sources / references
What did you draw from to build this pack? (Style guides, editorial standards, professional experience)
